column1: Hey Julie, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
hi! we would check in on the 14th and checkout on the 19th. i just wasn't sure how to start a room i have 4 people that want to book
okay cool yea I'll start it up for you! which destination?
Got you, our Grand Oasis package?
yea cancun is dope for sure. the grand oasis is a good time
sorry that text wasnt for you
morning Julia just let me know if it was the Grand Oasis you wanted to book and I'll set it up for you this am. March 14-19
yes i was just looking for a price breakdown before we fully set anything up
i have 4 friends who just booked same dates and it looks like it's 665 per person
and i believe they added their flights to this as well through your website
okay cool. yea the base pricing is 699 for the 5 night grand oasis package all inclusive. I can get you discounted to 665
theirs dont include flight though. they may have just added their own flight info to their accounts, so that we can orchestrate their airport pickup and dropoffs
that base rate is without flights
so how can i start this process on the website
I can make you a reservation, and you and your group can all hop on it, make your own accoun ts, and own payments to secure your spots
did you want me to get one started?
yes that sounds perfect thanks so much
Awesome will make that right now
I just emailed over the link with a bunch of info, but here it is for you too
okay perfect i will take a look thank you!!
so when is the last date that the 665 is due by ?
so first is the $200 deposit today that gets you all locked in and secure. the remaining $465 will be due Jan 2nd. gives y'all a little time gather yourselves for the balance
okay some of us can do the 200 deposit tonight and some aren't home and can do it tomorrow morning, is that okay?

hi spiffy! you helped me book my friends and i trip to cancun a little while ago and im just wondering if i can still purchase the travel protection? i realized on the email it says purchase within 14 days but when i go to the website to get a quote it seems that it's fine? just wondering if there is different terms if you wait to purchase till after 14 days
Typically you get 20 days to add it in, but if it looks fine to add on the Travel Insured site, give it a try!

Hi spiffy! you helped me and my friends book spring break for cancun march 14-19th and i was the booking leader. i ended up not being able to go but still paid the full 665 and seemingly can't get that back through go blue tours which is fine. just wondering if my friends go and show up without me if they will be fine checking into the room and everything without me even though i was the original booking leader. is there any way we can change the booking leader now that i won't be able to go?
just trying to figure this out and change this ASAP so that they can buy their flights
Hey Julie. You're friends will be just fine! Did you have someone that may be able to take your spot? May be the easiest way to recoup the money. I can help get them switched in

i'm not sure yet that's a good idea though i can try to do that as well possibly later. but for now can i just switch the booking leader to someone already on the reservation. the booking leader would be Layla van Hest.
Yea that's fine. We can switch it, but it honestly doesn't effect the booking at all
They're all still fine as is
yes if we could still switch the leader to layla that would be awesome. thank you so much for all your help i really appreciate it!
heyy Julie whats good! Just checkin in, did you guys get flights yet?

Hi spiffy! per our last conversation i unfortunately can't go on the trip, mid january we had a convo making my friend layla who is in the room the leader of the booking, i can send you over her contact info so you can talk to them about flights
that right, apologies on that. Layla is marked down as the group leader now
thanks for that, will reach out to them
I remember we spoke about potentially finding someone to take your spot, still wanna try for that, or not anymore?
